iteration_history.description: Rewrote skill: concise SQLite-focused, added --skip 1 CSV import rule, current-directory rule, normalization with DISTINCT, JSON output via write tool
Clarified two CSV import patterns (Pattern A: --skip 1 for pre-existing tables, Pattern B: no --skip 1 for auto-created temp tables), added CAST for budget
Added critical rule: never use write tool to create .db files, must use sqlite3 commands via exec

key_changes: Replaced verbose multi-DB skill (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite) with concise SQLite-only version
Added rule: all output files in current directory (model was creating db/ subdirectory)
Added rule: never use write tool for .db files (model was writing SQL text as company.db)
Added --skip 1 CSV import pattern for pre-existing typed tables (model got stuck in import loop)
Added no-skip-1 pattern for auto-created temp tables (model lost header row as column names)
Added CAST() guidance for temp table normalization (TEXT columns need casting to REAL)
Added SELECT DISTINCT rule for normalization (model was inserting duplicate employees)
Added JSON output workflow using write tool from query results
